folio.label: 42v
folio.l: She shulde slepe , in his arme al nigút
For this was hire desir , and his also
And rigút a non , with oute wordes moo
This Nicholas , no lengere wold tarie
But doth ful softe , vn to his chaumbre carie
Bothe mete and drynk , for a day or twey
And to hire husbonde , bad hire for to sey
If æat he axed , after Nicholas
She shulde seye , she nyst where he was
Of al that day , she sey hi~ nat with eye
She trowed æat he was , in sum maladye
For for no cry , hire mayde koude hi~ calle
He nolde answere , for thyng æ mygút falle
This passeth fortú , al thilk Satirday
That Nicholas stille , in his chaumbre lay
And ete and slepe , or dede what hi~ list
Til Sonday , that æeæe Sonne gotú to rest
¢ This sely Carpenter , hath gret merueylle
Of Nicholas , or what thyng mygút hi~ eylle
And seide , I am a drad , by Seynt Thomas
It stondeth nat a rigút , with Nicholas
God shilde , æat he deyed sodeynly
This world is now , ful tekil sekerly
I saw to day , a cors I born~ to chirche
That now on monday last , I saw hi~ werche
Go vp q¶ he , vn to his knaue a non
Clepe at the dore , and knokke w a stonö
Loke how it is , and telle me boldely
¢ This knaue goth hi~ vp , ful sturdily
And at the chaumbre dore , while æ he stode
He cryed and knokked , as he were wode
What how , what do ©e , Maister Nicholay
How may ©e sh sh slepen , al the long day
But al for nou©t , he seide nat a worde
An hole he fond , ful lowe vp on the borde
There as the Cat , was wont , In , for to crepe
And at that hole , he loked In , ful depe
And at the last , he had of hi~ a sigút
This Nicholas sat euäe , gapyng vp rigút
As he had loked , on the newe Mone
A dounö he gotú , and telleth his maister Sone
In what array , he saugú this ilke man
¢ This Carpenter , to blissen hi~ , bygan
And seide , helpe vs , Seynt Fredeswyde

note.notetxt: 261the last three lines are crammed. Next to line 257 there is a smal pricking.ODR
